summary: This is a brief Friday link post where Joel Spolsky directs readers to watch his interview on The Scoble Show with Robert Scoble. He offers both a full hour-long version and a 6-minute edited highlights version. The post contains essentially no substantive content beyond the links themselves.
key_points: Joel was interviewed by Robert Scoble for The Scoble Show, a popular tech video series
The interview runs just over an hour with a 6-minute edited version available
The post is a casual Friday link drop with minimal commentary
money_quotes: It's Friday, and you weren't going to get anything done anyway, so go watch Robert Scoble interview me for The Scoble Show.
key_insight: A throwaway link post pointing readers to an external video interview, with no substantive argument or analysis.
